query:
insert or ignore into RequirementHierarchies (
                            req_hierarchies_hash,
                            child_product_id,
                            child_req_id,
                            parent_product_id,
                            parent_req_id
                        )
                        values (
                            $1,
                            $2,
                            $3,
                            $4,
                            $5
                        )
